title: gaertnera oblanceolata var. diversifolia
intro: Gaertnera oblanceolata var. diversifolia, commonly known as the Malabar Gaertnera, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Malabar region of India, for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The Malabar Gaertnera is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Malabar Gaertnera can be used to make a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
